Defendant Seiler Llp Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint For Equitable Indemnity And Contribution
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Fife of Wild, Carey & Fife telephone number 415-837-3101 for Defendant Kenneth Everett.
Allen Kuo of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney telephone number 415-788-1900 for Defendant Seiler LLP.

Counsel represented to the Court that they have a stipulation to allow filing of the cross-complaint upon certain conditions, that it was presented to the Court and that it was rejected by the Clerk. The parties were advised to appear at the ex parte calendar and present the stipulation for review. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SEILER LLP'S Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint For Equitable Indemnity And Contribution is off calendar.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Fife of Wild, Carey & Fife telephone number 415-837-3101 for Defendant Kenneth Everett.
Allen Kuo of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney telephone number 415-788-1900 for Defendant Seiler LLP.

Counsel represented to the Court that they have a stipulation to allow filing of the cross-complaint upon certain conditions, that it was presented to the Court and that it was rejected by the Clerk. The parties were advised to appear at the ex parte calendar and present the stipulation for review. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KENNETH EVERETT'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is off calendar. Improper service.

No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DEREK BENHAM'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Defendants Norman A. Barnes, South Parcel Partners And SN Barnes is granted. The three defendants shall serve code complaint responses to all outstanding discovery within twenty days from the date of service of this Order with Notice of Entry. Sanctions are awarded against the three defendants in the sum of $1,790.00 to be paid within said twenty days. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
